title: Give Us This Day
writer: Pietro Di Donato, Ben Barzman, John Penn
actors: Sam Wanamaker, Lea Padovani, Kathleen Ryan
plot: One of the few (if any at the time this film was made) films shot in England with New York City's 'Little Italy" as the locale. This was Edward Dmytryk's first film after he had refused to tell a Congressional Committee whether or...
